title: चन्द्र दोष निवारण स्तोत्रम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री चन्द्र दोष निवारण स्तोत्रम् ॥

ॐ सों सोमाय नमः

चन्द्रदोषनिवारणार्थं स्तोत्रं वक्ष्यामि सुन्दरम्।
सोमं प्रणम्य देवेशं मनःशान्तिकरं परम्॥१॥

दधिशंखतुषाराभं क्षीरोदार्णवसम्भवम्।
नमामि शशिनं सोमं शम्भोर्मुकुटभूषणम्॥२॥

रोहिणीपतिं शीतलं चन्द्रं मनःप्रसादकम्।
सर्वचन्द्रदोषहरं सोमदेवं नमाम्यहम्॥३॥

मनोरोगनिवारणं चन्द्रो बुद्धिप्रकाशकः।
जलतत्त्वाधिपो देवः शान्तिदं सोमभूषणम्॥४॥

क्षयं वृद्धिं च शीतांशोः सर्वमानसजं ज्वरम्।
निवारय महादेव चन्द्रकृपा सदा कुरु॥५॥

चन्द्रमा मनसो जातो विधोर्विष्णोः पदं परम्।
चन्द्रदोषो विनश्येत सोमप्रसादतः सदा॥६॥

सोमवारे पठेन्नित्यं चन्द्रदोषनिवारणम्।
पूर्णिमायां विशेषेण मनःशान्तिकरं भवेत्॥७॥

॥ इति श्री चन्द्र दोष निवारण स्तोत्रं सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Chandra Dosh Nivaran Stotram ||

Om Som Somaya Namah

Chandra-dosha-nivaranartham Stotram Vakshyami Sundaram.
Somam Pranamya Devesham Manah-shanti-karam Param.||1||

Dadhi-shankha-tusharabham Kshirodarnava-sambhavam.
Namami Shashinam Somam Shambhor-mukuta-bhushanam.||2||

Rohini-patim Shitalam Chandram Manah-prasadakam.
Sarva-chandra-dosha-haram Soma-devam Namamyaham.||3||

Mano-roga-nivaranam Chandrah Buddhi-prakashakah.
Jala-tattva-adhipo Devah Shanti-dam Soma-bhushanam.||4||

Kshayam Vriddhim Cha Shitamshoh Sarva-manasajam Jvaram.
Nivaraya Mahadeva Chandra-kripa Sada Kuru.||5||

Chandrama Manaso Jato Vidhor-vishnoh Padam Param.
Chandra-dosho Vinashyeta Soma-prasadatah Sada.||6||

Somavare Pathen-nityam Chandra-dosha-nivaranam.
Purnimayam Visheshena Manah-shanti-karam Bhavet.||7||

|| Iti Shri Chandra Dosh Nivaran Stotram Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning: चन्द्रदोष निवारण हेतु सोम देवेश को प्रणाम जो मनःशान्तिकर हैं। दही-शंख-तुषार जैसे उज्ज्वल, क्षीरसागर से उत्पन्न, शम्भु मुकुट भूषण शशि सोम को नमन। रोहिणीपति शीतल चन्द्र मनःप्रसादक, सर्वचन्द्रदोषहर। चन्द्र मनोरोग निवारक, बुद्धि प्रकाशक, जलतत्त्व अधिपति। सोमवार को नित्य पढ़ें और पूर्णिमा को विशेष रूप से पढ़ने पर मनःशान्ति होती है।
benefits: Traditionally recited for removal of chandra dosha (moon affliction) from the horoscope
Associated in tradition with mental health issues, anxiety, and emotional instability
Strengthens a weak or afflicted Moon in the birth chart
Invokes mental peace, emotional balance, and clarity of thought
Best recited on Mondays and especially on Purnima (full moon)
Beneficial for those suffering from insomnia and depression
description: The Chandra Dosh Nivaran Stotram, known in Sanskrit as चन्द्र दोष निवारण स्तोत्रम्, is a devotional hymn of praise in praise of Lord Shiva. Rooted in Graha Shanti Vidhi, this composition carries deep spiritual significance. Regular recitation is believed to heal mental health issues, anxiety, and emotional instability, remove Chandra Dosha (Moon affliction) from the horoscope, and grant mental peace, emotional balance, and clarity of thought. This prayer is traditionally recited on Monday (Somvar) and during Sharad Purnima to invoke divine grace. At 7 verses long, the recitation takes roughly 4 minutes, making it accessible for regular devotional use. On this page, you can read the complete Chandra Dosh Nivaran Stotram in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Chandra Dosh Nivaran Stotram in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Prayer to remove Moon affliction for mental peace and emotional balance.

seoFaqs.question: What is Chandra Dosha?
seoFaqs.answer: Chandra Dosha refers to the malefic effects of a weak or afflicted Moon (Chandra) in one's birth chart. Symptoms in Vedic astrology include emotional instability, mental restlessness, strained relationships with the mother, sleep disturbances, and difficulties during the Chandra Mahadasha period.

seoFaqs.question: What is the main Chandra Dosh Nivaran Mantra?
seoFaqs.answer: The classical dhyana shloka recited for Chandra dosha is: 'Dadhi-shankha-tushaarabham ksheerodaarnava sambhavam, namami shashinam somam shambhor mukuta-bhushanam' — meaning 'I bow to the Moon, white as curd, conch and snow, born of the ocean of milk, and the crown ornament of Lord Shiva.'

seoFaqs.question: What is the Chandra Beej Mantra?
seoFaqs.answer: The Chandra beej mantra is 'Om Shram Shreem Shraum Sah Chandramase Namah'. A simpler form, 'Om Som Somaya Namah', is also widely chanted. Traditional prescription is 108 repetitions daily, with 11,000 chants forming a complete anushthana for Chandra dosha nivaran.

seoFaqs.question: When should Chandra Dosh Nivaran Stotra be chanted?
seoFaqs.answer: Recitation is begun on a Monday (the day of Chandra) — preferably in the bright half (Shukla Paksha) — and continued for 9, 16, or 40 consecutive Mondays. Pradosh kala on Monday evening, Pournima (full moon), and the Krittika or Rohini nakshatra days are considered especially auspicious.

seoFaqs.question: What are the traditional remedies for Chandra Dosha?
seoFaqs.answer: Vedic remedies include chanting the Chandra Beej Mantra 108 times daily, observing fast on Mondays for 9 or 16 consecutive weeks, offering water mixed with milk and white flowers to the Moon at evening, donating white items (rice, milk, sugar, white cloth), wearing a pearl set in silver, and serving one's mother with care.

seoFaqs.question: Which deity is associated with Chandra dosha remedies?
seoFaqs.answer: Lord Shiva is the principal deity for Chandra-related remedies, since Chandra adorns Shiva's matted locks as Chandrashekhara. Worship of Shiva — especially Somnath (Soma being a name of Chandra) — through Mondays and Pradosham observance is the most prescribed remedy in Hindu tradition.
